title: Quality Focused Strategic Meetup in Doğuş University

Student

News

Details

Date: 10 February 2026

Quality Focused Strategic Meetup in Doğuş University

Doğuş University hosted a strategic meeting focused on quality and corporate excellence!

Hosted by our Rector, Prof. Dr. Ahmet Alkan ÇELİK, the meeting welcomed key figures including KalDer Board Member and Yeditepe University Rector Prof. Dr. Mehmet DURMAN, KalDer Secretary General Sabri BÜLBÜL, MG Group General Manager Ahmet HÜSEYNİ, and KalDer Director of Congress, Events, and Corporate Communications Gözde DEMİR.

Also present at the meeting were our Vice Rectors Prof. Dr. Yelda ÖZKOÇAK and Prof. Dr. Erkut ALTINDAĞ, Advisor to the Rector Prof. Dr. Şirin KARADENİZ, Secretary General Att. Bağlan UZGÖREN, BWI-Hub Director Asst. Prof. Dr. Turhan KARAKAYA, Quality Coordinator Prof. Dr. Hakan BOZKURT, Quality Unit Manager Aslı ÖZMUTLU, and Research Projects Coordinator of the Business and Innovation Office Tuba ALGÜN.

Reinforcing Doğuş University's vision focused on quality, this strategic gathering laid the groundwork for exemplary partnerships driven by a sustainable quality approach in higher education.
